---
title: "Mrs Lynch"
---

## Mrs Lynch

### Description

The Mrs Lynch whose story or article was considered in 1890 may be the E. M. Lynch whose \'Has Every Man his Price?\'  was published in <i>MP</i> (December 1887).  The <i>Wellesley Index</i> proposes Mrs Edward Melville Lynch, rather feebly I feel.

### Letters

- Letter from 

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
